steps.title: State the two traditions
steps.content: The notes give one relevant distinction: Venetian portolan charts tended to be sparse in illustrations, while Majorcan portolan charts tended to be richly illustrated. The sentence must express that contrast without reversing it.

steps.title: Reject distorted contrasts
steps.content: A reverses the traditions by making Majorcan charts sparse. B only says the cartographers differed without naming the distinction. C misleadingly assigns Mediterranean and Black Sea mapping only to Venetian charts. The accurate contrast is rich Majorcan illustration versus sparser Venetian illustration. The answer is D.
